abilities.name: Brutal Fire Lord
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that targeted this model, this model may either deal 1 damage to the target or have the target gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Demise (Elemental Breakdown)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, enemy models within (t) 4" of this model are dealt 1 damage and gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Flameborn
abilities.text: When this model would suffer damage from a Burning token, it instead heals that amount.

actions.name: The Thousand Arms of Justice
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Ember
triggers.text: The target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Revelation
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Toss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This may target friendly models. Target a model of lower Sz than this model.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 10" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Falling does not end this movement.

triggers.name: Ember
triggers.text: The target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Flaming Aura
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Burning token.

actions.name: The Flame's Embrace
actions.effects: Enemies within range must pass a TN 13 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Burning token. Models with a Burning token suffer a (-) to this duel.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
